Section: hotel name
ICONIQA

Section: city
Mumbai

Section: total area
Over 300,000 sqft of built up space

Section: building height
34 meters

Section: total floors
15 (including 4 basements and 10 guest floors)

Section: total rooms
291

Section: room distribution
1st: 9, 6th: 34, 7th: 32, 2nd-5th, 8th-9th: 36 each

Section: premier king room
Total 134 rooms 109 rooms are of 229–285 sq. ft. 25 rooms are 300 - 340 sq. ft A calming palette, cloud-soft linens, and a versatile table-and-chair duo designed to flow effortlessly from work to wind-down, where essentials feel elevated. All our rooms feature an incredible collection of amenities that are designed around you, the guest: In-room smart laundry closet to iron, steam, refresh your clothes Complimentary well-stocked non-alcoholic minibar Custom created "Bed of Dreams" with traceable cotton linen Espresso Machines + coffee pods with ICONIQA's single origin coffees High-speed WiFi with unlimited device usage Power shower with Indian Ayurvedic influenced bath products Slew of thoughtful bathroom amenities that are sustainable and recyclable

Section: premier twin room

Section: lux suite
Total 79 rooms, 15 rooms are 380-425 sq.ft with King bed. 64 rooms are 430 - 485 sq. ft with Twin bed Step into the epitome of luxury in our LUX Suite, designed for those who appreciate space and sophistication. Spanning 381 to 485 sq. ft., this suite features a sumptuous king-size bed with premium linens, a separate seating area, and floor-to-ceiling windows with panoramic city views. The spacious bathroom is fitted with premium fixtures for a rejuvenating experience. A uniquely crafted bedside reading lamp adds a touch of thoughtful elegance, creating the perfect ambiance for relaxation. Section: banquet spaces
Lobby Level: ICONIQA Rooms ICONIQA Rooms inside boast of a combined 3,000 sq. ft. of flexible, personality-packed space. Perfect for intimate gatherings, stylish socials, and standout events that deserve more than a standard setup. Adaptable layouts, elevated aesthetics, and a setting that speaks volumes, without saying a word. Pre-function space of over 1200 sqft Lawns attached are 2500 sqft ICONIQA Rooms can be split into two halls - ICONIQA ROOM 1 and ICONIQA ROOM 2, so you could take one space for a more intimate setting Genius Rooms on the First Floor are smaller yet equally impressive spaces, perfect for intimate meetings, brainstorming sessions, or workshops. Equipped with state-of-the-art technology and professional support. Genius I : 300+ sq. ft Genius II : 650+ sq. ft Genius III : 430+ sq. ft The hotel has multiple spaces at Aviator, Kadak or Bombay Swim Club that can be taken out for private-hire from 10 to 300 people. Kadak Lab on Level 1 has a lovely space of about 1000 sqft that is divisible. The space can be used for private gatherings or conferences. Large windows with tree views make this a beautiful spot to work or entertain in.

Section: spa timings
9:00 AM – 11:00 PM

Section: pool timings
7:00 AM to 7:00PM open to all. No children allowed after 7:00pm Guests with reservations at Bombay Swim Club may use the pool until 11 PM

Section: jacuzzi timings
6:00 AM – 8:00 PM

Section: yoga sessions
Live: 8–9 AM (twice a week), The Yoga studio is powered by AI Yoga Screens that you can access 24x7 and do a self-driven workout.

Section: airport transfer
Available, Toyota Innova Hycross 5 seater. ₹2000 for T1, ₹1500 for T2

Section: checkin time
14:00 hrs

Section: checkout time
11:00 hrs

Section: early checkin policy
Before 07:00 AM → 50% of room rate, subject to availability

Section: late checkout policy
Complimentary till 12 noon, 50% of the room rate till 4 PM, post 4 PM full night charges are applicable , subject to availability

Section: doctor on call
Yes, Dr. Deepak Tiwari M.B.S(BOM), 24x7, ₹2500 consultation

Section: valet parking
Yes, capacity: 300 vehicles in the Basement

Section: smoking policy
All rooms non-smoking, designated zones: Roof top, Outside the main porch,

Section: nearby attractions
Our concierge will help curate an experience for you - be it shopping in Chor Bazaar, an Art-Deco tour of Mumbai, a visit to Mahakali Caves, or simply to go to the movies. Just pop in to see the concierge.

Section: nearby hospitals
SevenHills, Mukund, Holy Spirit

Section: business center
While we do not have a formal business center, ICONIQA blurs the lines between Business and Leisure. Multiple spaces are available around the hotel to work, print sheets, have a quick meeting or get some real work done.

Section: Pilate Timings
Self Use of Pilates equipment is available 24x7 However, the hotel is happy to arrange classes with a trainer for you at an additional charge

Section: Cancellation Policy
On BAR : 48 hrs prior to the arrival date Advance Purchase : Non-refundable, Non-amendable, Non-cancellable (Same has to be charged on the same day of the received booking) Corporate / TA : As per the cancellation policy mentioned in the signed contract

Section: Hotel Sales Script
Starting in the Lobby – First Impressions Welcome to ICONIQA Hotel – Mumbai International Airport. We are trying to reimagine the traditional airport hotel, and on this walk I will show you how. We’re just 300 meters from Terminal 2, but the moment you step inside, it feels more like a lifestyle destination than a boring hotel stop. That’s the whole idea: just because you're between flights-or meetings-doesn’t mean your experience should feel "in between." Unlike the norm, when you enter the hotel, you enter a vibrant bar - the Aviator Lounge. At Aviator, we focus on a global small plates menu – non-messy, all day, and really cool. This has been designed as a space for you to have a meeting or enjoy a cocktail, as it seamlessly blends business and pleasure. Its not your usual lobby lounge, but the heart of the ground floor. Morning coffee, post-meeting cocktails, late-night wind-downs-it's whatever you want it to be. The idea is to make the lobby a place you actually want to hang out in. From a sensory perspective – we have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from

Section: Hotel Sales Script
have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from work to play seamlessly It’s more than just the heart of the lobby-it’s your anytime-anywhere hangout zone. Key Talking Points: Entrance – Enter a bar and not the lobby. Bar is multi-purpose. Cocktails. Global menu. Multi-sensory experience – interactive art, ICONIQA playlist on Spotify. So where do we check in… That’s to the right. Lets talk about design a little bit. Baccarat inspired chandeliers dot the entrance foyer, and then you go towards the reception that is crowned with an incredible black crystal chandelier. The counter is made with little Bisazza tiles – and the pattern is from an antique Kashmiri rug. But instead of putting the Kashmiri rug in the lobby, we decided to get one made to mimic the pixelation of the Bisazza tiles. Lights are by Roche Bobois and Baccarat. Design is at the heart of everything we do, and hence I’m spending this time to tell you about it A reception counter is a reception counter as with all hotels, but this hotel is completely enabled by Whatsapp. You don’t have to check in using the

Section: Hotel Sales Script
we do, and hence I’m spending this time to tell you about it A reception counter is a reception counter as with all hotels, but this hotel is completely enabled by Whatsapp. You don’t have to check in using the desk! If you want, you can go the entire stay glued to your screen on whatsapp. Key Talking Points Design is at the heart of everything we do. The Kashmiri rug became the Bisazza tile counter. The Bisazza tile counter became the handmade rug. Whatsapp powers the entire guest experience So what can you do on Whatsapp with the hotel? (You will explain whatsapp as you walk from the lobby to the Iconiqa Room) Pretty much everything. From Checkin in, ordering a car, linen, or booking a massage – its all available seamless. No app downloads, no waiting. Just seamless, instant hospitality. THE ICONIQA ROOM – Work, Celebrate, Create Now this is The ICONIQA Room-approximately 3000 square feet of modular, sunlit space, designed for anything from brand pitches to brainstorming retreats, from stylish socials to intimate gatherings. The hall can be split into 2, with each area getting its own private outdoor patio. We could easily do a social for 300+ people and a sit down dinner for 150 with space for a dance floor. It is fully kitted out,

Section: Hotel Sales Script
be split into 2, with each area getting its own private outdoor patio. We could easily do a social for 300+ people and a sit down dinner for 150 with space for a dance floor. It is fully kitted out, with its own sound system, mood lighting, projections systems and the like. Key Talking Points Flexible modern banquet room Fully kitted out Great pre-function space and outdoor spaces Lets go to the first floor All hotels have a bigger larger fancier coffee shop, with mundane food. We decided to do away with the idea of the coffee shop. Welcome to Kadak Lab: our indoor-outdoor modern bazaar inspired Pan-Indian restaurant that is multi-sensory and multi-functional Again,we’ve done things differently. The first bit is the Sweet Lab that’s open 24x7. Think of this as a cute café with incredible desserts and Indian inspired snacks all day. This isn’t your typical Indian dining space. Kadak brings together the heart of regional Indian cuisine, elevated with global inspiration. Here, you'll experience bold flavours crafted from premium ingredients sourced from around the world—where every dish feels familiar yet new. A few highlights to notice: • Kadak Restaurant, a vibrant, open live kitchen brings the energy of the restaurant to life. • Kadak Garden - Step outdoors and you’ll find two live counters—a South Indian street

Section: Hotel Sales Script
feels familiar yet new. A few highlights to notice: • Kadak Restaurant, a vibrant, open live kitchen brings the energy of the restaurant to life. • Kadak Garden - Step outdoors and you’ll find two live counters—a South Indian street food spot, Cocktail Bar and Snack Bar. • Kadak Parlour - with floor to ceiling window, the space can be used for breakfast, meetings, or even hired privately for parties and events. The Garden bar vibe is niche, casual, and experiential—with a signature bar offering house-crafted cocktails crafted exclusively for the space. • The immersive ambience, complemented by atmospheric lighting and curated soundscapes, sets the tone for every meal. • And every dish arrives on handcrafted crockery—with custom presentation that’s as considered as the flavours themselves. Kadak Lab serves a buffet breakfast exclusively for in-house guests, while lunch and dinner are à la carte, crafted to offer a more personalized, plate-by-plate experience. It’s comfort food—but designed to surprise you. Kadak Cafe – Sweet, Progressive, Open 24/7 Kadak Cafe—a lively, all-day, all-night space where bold flavours meet artistic presentation. A few highlights to savour: • Elegant, flavour-forward plated desserts with a modern, creative edge. • A progressive pastry counter offering inventive takes on nostalgic favourites. • Signature handcrafted coffees—perfect for pairing with your sweet fix at any hour. And because sweet

Section: Hotel Sales Script
highlights to savour: • Elegant, flavour-forward plated desserts with a modern, creative edge. • A progressive pastry counter offering inventive takes on nostalgic favourites. • Signature handcrafted coffees—perfect for pairing with your sweet fix at any hour. And because sweet cravings don’t follow a clock, the 24/7 menu keeps things flowing-with pastries, quick bites, and coffee available for dine-in or takeaway. The Cafe is where creativity, nostalgia, and everyday indulgence come together-with moments that taste as good as they look. GENIUS SPACES – Small, Smart, Purposeful Just alongside, we have our Genius Spaces. These are smaller, but equally impressive rooms-perfect for brainstorming sessions, creative workshops, or intimate meetings that need a touch of polish. Each space comes equipped with state-of-the-art technology and seamless professional support-because great ideas deserve a great setting. ROOM - Where Calm Meets Character Let’s step into our rooms, designed not just for a stay, but to elevate your mood. Across our 291 rooms, you’ll find a soothing blend of light pastels, soft blues and greens, and warm wood textures-spaces that instantly calm you after a journey. Every detail here has been thoughtfully curated to create an experience that feels both welcoming and refreshing. You’ll notice: • Mumbai’s spirit reflected in the curated art-hot air balloons, intricate cityscapes, and local motifs, weaving quiet stories on the walls.

Section: Hotel Sales Script
Every detail here has been thoughtfully curated to create an experience that feels both welcoming and refreshing. You’ll notice: • Mumbai’s spirit reflected in the curated art-hot air balloons, intricate cityscapes, and local motifs, weaving quiet stories on the walls. • A Blue Tokai <Not sure if we need to consider mentioning the brand names>espresso machine in every room, unlike other hotels with ICONIQA’s unique blends-because airport coffee just doesn’t cut it. <else> An espresso machine in every room, serving ICONIQA’s unique coffee blends-because airport coffee just doesn’t cut it. • Hypoallergenic linen for a truly cloud-like sleep experience. • An indulgent, non-alcoholic minibar, included as part of your stay—because meaningful touches should simply be a given. And this-this is something you won’t find anywhere else: ICONIQA Hotel Mumbai is the world’s first hotel to feature an in-room Smart Laundry Closet. Refresh your garments at your convenience-no waiting, no calls, just seamless comfort built into your space. These rooms aren’t just where you stay. They’re where your mood resets, and your journey finds its pause. THE BOMBAY SWIM CLUB + SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity

Section: Hotel Sales Script
SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity jacuzzi, a spa, and a fully equipped gym. And soon, it will also be home to an exciting Japanese-Mexican kitchen-where sushi meets tacos, served with uninterrupted skyline views. Bombay Swim Club is open to everyone with a minimum spend of Rs. 2500 per head. Up here, it’s not just about being above the city. It’s about feeling a little beyond it. Hidden from public view, and open to those who know is Scarletta-our invitation-only speakeasy Unapologetically bold, Scarletta is the space for exclusive gatherings, after-parties, or simply soaking in private time with friends. Closing lines At ICONIQA, it’s not about ticking boxes — it’s about tuning into how you feel. Whether it’s a quick pitstop, a rooftop escape, or a sweet moment at midnight — you’ll always find a space that fits your vibe. Hope you enjoyed the walk — and even more, we hope you come back to live it for real. ****

Section: Hotel Address
Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road , Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099

Section: Beauty Bar
The nail and beauty bar offers a slew of quick fix beauty therapies. From nail art, manicures, pedicures, or a quick blow dry, we have a star crew to glam you up from 9am through to 10pm

Section: Wellness Rooms
Traditional spa therapies are replaced ICONIQA style with candlelight therapies. Functional massages to help with jetlag or hangovers, along with foot massages by the poolside at Bombay Swim Club.

Section: Hotel Sales Script
Starting in the Lobby – First Impressions Welcome to ICONIQA Hotel – Mumbai International Airport. We are trying to reimagine the traditional airport hotel, and on this walk I will show you how. We’re just 300 meters from Terminal 2, but the moment you step inside, it feels more like a lifestyle destination than a boring hotel stop. That’s the whole idea: just because you're between flights-or meetings-doesn’t mean your experience should feel "in between." Unlike the norm, when you enter the hotel, you enter a vibrant bar - the Aviator Lounge. At Aviator, we focus on a global small plates menu – non-messy, all day, and really cool. This has been designed as a space for you to have a meeting or enjoy a cocktail, as it seamlessly blends business and pleasure. Its not your usual lobby lounge, but the heart of the ground floor. Morning coffee, post-meeting cocktails, late-night wind-downs-it's whatever you want it to be. The idea is to make the lobby a place you actually want to hang out in. From a sensory perspective – we have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from

Section: Hotel Sales Script
have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from work to play seamlessly It’s more than just the heart of the lobby-it’s your anytime-anywhere hangout zone. Key Talking Points: Entrance – Enter a bar and not the lobby. Bar is multi-purpose. Cocktails. Global menu. Multi-sensory experience – interactive art, ICONIQA playlist on Spotify. So where do we check in… That’s to the right. Lets talk about design a little bit. Baccarat inspired chandeliers dot the entrance foyer, and then you go towards the reception that is crowned with an incredible black crystal chandelier. The counter is made with little Bisazza tiles – and the pattern is from an antique Kashmiri rug. But instead of putting the Kashmiri rug in the lobby, we decided to get one made to mimic the pixelation of the Bisazza tiles. Lights are by Roche Bobois and Baccarat. If you want, you can go the entire stay glued to your screen on whatsapp. Key Talking Points Design is at the heart of everything we do. The Kashmiri rug became the Bisazza tile counter. The Bisazza tile counter became the handmade rug. Whatsapp powers the entire guest experience So what can you do on Whatsapp with the hotel? (You will explain whatsapp as you walk from the lobby to the Iconiqa Room) Pretty much everything. From Checkin in, ordering a car, linen, or booking a massage – its all available seamless. No app downloads, no waiting. Just seamless, instant hospitality. THE ICONIQA ROOM – Work, Celebrate, Create Now this is The ICONIQA Room-approximately 3000 square feet of modular, sunlit space, designed for anything from brand pitches to brainstorming retreats, from stylish socials to intimate gatherings. The hall can be split into 2, with each area getting its own private outdoor patio. We could easily do a social for 300+ people and a sit down dinner for 150 with space for a dance floor. The Garden bar vibe is niche, casual, and experiential—with a signature bar offering house-crafted cocktails crafted exclusively for the space. • The immersive ambience, complemented by atmospheric lighting and curated soundscapes, sets the tone for every meal. • And every dish arrives on handcrafted crockery—with custom presentation that’s as considered as the flavours themselves. Kadak Lab serves a buffet breakfast exclusively for in-house guests, while lunch and dinner are à la carte, crafted to offer a more personalized, plate-by-plate experience. You’ll notice: • Mumbai’s spirit reflected in the curated art-hot air balloons, intricate cityscapes, and local motifs, weaving quiet stories on the walls. • A Blue Tokai <Not sure if we need to consider mentioning the brand names>espresso machine in every room, unlike other hotels with ICONIQA’s unique blends-because airport coffee just doesn’t cut it. <else> An espresso machine in every room, serving ICONIQA’s unique coffee blends-because airport coffee just doesn’t cut it. • Hypoallergenic linen for a truly cloud-like sleep experience. • An indulgent, non-alcoholic minibar, included as part of your stay—because meaningful touches should simply be a given. And this-this is something you won’t find anywhere else: ICONIQA Hotel Mumbai is the world’s first hotel to feature an in-room Smart Laundry Closet. Refresh your garments at your convenience-no waiting, no calls, just seamless comfort built into your space. These rooms aren’t just where you stay. They’re where your mood resets, and your journey finds its pause. THE BOMBAY SWIM CLUB + SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity

Section: Hotel Sales Script
SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity jacuzzi, a spa, and a fully equipped gym. And soon, it will also be home to an exciting Japanese-Mexican kitchen-where sushi meets tacos, served with uninterrupted skyline views. Bombay Swim Club is open to everyone with a minimum spend of Rs. 2500 per head. Up here, it’s not just about being above the city. It’s about feeling a little beyond it. Hidden from public view, and open to those who know is Scarletta-our invitation-only speakeasy Unapologetically bold, Scarletta is the space for exclusive gatherings, after-parties, or simply soaking in private time with friends. Closing lines At ICONIQA, it’s not about ticking boxes — it’s about tuning into how you feel. Whether it’s a quick pitstop, a rooftop escape, or a sweet moment at midnight — you’ll always find a space that fits your vibe. Hope you enjoyed the walk — and even more, we hope you come back to live it for real. ****

Section: Hotel Address
Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road , Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099

Section: Beauty Bar
The nail and beauty bar offers a slew of quick fix beauty therapies. From nail art, manicures, pedicures, or a quick blow dry, we have a star crew to glam you up from 9am through to 10pm

Section: Wellness Rooms
Traditional spa therapies are replaced ICONIQA style with candlelight therapies. Functional massages to help with jetlag or hangovers, along with foot massages by the poolside at Bombay Swim Club.

Section: banquet spaces
Lobby Level: ICONIQA Rooms ICONIQA Rooms inside boast of a combined 3,000 sq. ft. of flexible, personality-packed space. Perfect for intimate gatherings, stylish socials, and standout events that deserve more than a standard setup. Adaptable layouts, elevated aesthetics, and a setting that speaks volumes, without saying a word. Pre-function space of over 1200 sqft Lawns attached are 2500 sqft ICONIQA Rooms can be split into two halls - ICONIQA ROOM 1 and ICONIQA ROOM 2, so you could take one space for a more intimate setting Genius Rooms on the First Floor are smaller yet equally impressive spaces, perfect for intimate meetings, brainstorming sessions, or workshops. Equipped with state-of-the-art technology and professional support. Genius I : 300+ sq. ft Genius II : 650+ sq. ft Genius III : 430+ sq. ft The hotel has multiple spaces at Aviator, Kadak or Bombay Swim Club that can be taken out for private-hire from 10 to 300 people. Kadak Lab on Level 1 has a lovely space of about 1000 sqft that is divisible. The space can be used for private gatherings or conferences. Large windows with tree views make this a beautiful spot to work or entertain in.

Section: Hotel Sales Script
Starting in the Lobby – First Impressions Welcome to ICONIQA Hotel – Mumbai International Airport. We are trying to reimagine the traditional airport hotel, and on this walk I will show you how. We’re just 300 meters from Terminal 2, but the moment you step inside, it feels more like a lifestyle destination than a boring hotel stop. That’s the whole idea: just because you're between flights-or meetings-doesn’t mean your experience should feel "in between." Unlike the norm, when you enter the hotel, you enter a vibrant bar - the Aviator Lounge. At Aviator, we focus on a global small plates menu – non-messy, all day, and really cool. This has been designed as a space for you to have a meeting or enjoy a cocktail, as it seamlessly blends business and pleasure. Its not your usual lobby lounge, but the heart of the ground floor. Morning coffee, post-meeting cocktails, late-night wind-downs-it's whatever you want it to be. The idea is to make the lobby a place you actually want to hang out in. From a sensory perspective – we have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from

Section: Hotel Sales Script
have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from work to play seamlessly It’s more than just the heart of the lobby-it’s your anytime-anywhere hangout zone. Key Talking Points: Entrance – Enter a bar and not the lobby. Bar is multi-purpose. Cocktails. Global menu. Multi-sensory experience – interactive art, ICONIQA playlist on Spotify. So where do we check in… That’s to the right. Lets talk about design a little bit. Baccarat inspired chandeliers dot the entrance foyer, and then you go towards the reception that is crowned with an incredible black crystal chandelier. The counter is made with little Bisazza tiles – and the pattern is from an antique Kashmiri rug. But instead of putting the Kashmiri rug in the lobby, we decided to get one made to mimic the pixelation of the Bisazza tiles. Lights are by Roche Bobois and Baccarat. Design is at the heart of everything we do, and hence I’m spending this time to tell you about it A reception counter is a reception counter as with all hotels, but this hotel is completely enabled by Whatsapp. You don’t have to check in using the

Section: Hotel Sales Script
we do, and hence I’m spending this time to tell you about it A reception counter is a reception counter as with all hotels, but this hotel is completely enabled by Whatsapp. You don’t have to check in using the desk! If you want, you can go the entire stay glued to your screen on whatsapp. Key Talking Points Design is at the heart of everything we do. The Kashmiri rug became the Bisazza tile counter. The Bisazza tile counter became the handmade rug. Whatsapp powers the entire guest experience So what can you do on Whatsapp with the hotel? (You will explain whatsapp as you walk from the lobby to the Iconiqa Room) Pretty much everything. From Checkin in, ordering a car, linen, or booking a massage – its all available seamless. No app downloads, no waiting. Just seamless, instant hospitality. THE ICONIQA ROOM – Work, Celebrate, Create Now this is The ICONIQA Room-approximately 3000 square feet of modular, sunlit space, designed for anything from brand pitches to brainstorming retreats, from stylish socials to intimate gatherings. The hall can be split into 2, with each area getting its own private outdoor patio. We could easily do a social for 300+ people and a sit down dinner for 150 with space for a dance floor. It is fully kitted out,

Section: Hotel Sales Script
be split into 2, with each area getting its own private outdoor patio. We could easily do a social for 300+ people and a sit down dinner for 150 with space for a dance floor. It is fully kitted out, with its own sound system, mood lighting, projections systems and the like. Key Talking Points Flexible modern banquet room Fully kitted out Great pre-function space and outdoor spaces Lets go to the first floor All hotels have a bigger larger fancier coffee shop, with mundane food. We decided to do away with the idea of the coffee shop. Welcome to Kadak Lab: our indoor-outdoor modern bazaar inspired Pan-Indian restaurant that is multi-sensory and multi-functional Again,we’ve done things differently. The first bit is the Sweet Lab that’s open 24x7. Think of this as a cute café with incredible desserts and Indian inspired snacks all day. This isn’t your typical Indian dining space. Kadak brings together the heart of regional Indian cuisine, elevated with global inspiration. Here, you'll experience bold flavours crafted from premium ingredients sourced from around the world—where every dish feels familiar yet new. A few highlights to notice: • Kadak Restaurant, a vibrant, open live kitchen brings the energy of the restaurant to life. • Kadak Garden - Step outdoors and you’ll find two live counters—a South Indian street

Section: Hotel Sales Script
feels familiar yet new. A few highlights to notice: • Kadak Restaurant, a vibrant, open live kitchen brings the energy of the restaurant to life. • Kadak Garden - Step outdoors and you’ll find two live counters—a South Indian street food spot, Cocktail Bar and Snack Bar. • Kadak Parlour - with floor to ceiling window, the space can be used for breakfast, meetings, or even hired privately for parties and events. The Garden bar vibe is niche, casual, and experiential—with a signature bar offering house-crafted cocktails crafted exclusively for the space. • The immersive ambience, complemented by atmospheric lighting and curated soundscapes, sets the tone for every meal. • And every dish arrives on handcrafted crockery—with custom presentation that’s as considered as the flavours themselves. Kadak Lab serves a buffet breakfast exclusively for in-house guests, while lunch and dinner are à la carte, crafted to offer a more personalized, plate-by-plate experience. It’s comfort food—but designed to surprise you. Kadak Cafe – Sweet, Progressive, Open 24/7 Kadak Cafe—a lively, all-day, all-night space where bold flavours meet artistic presentation. A few highlights to savour: • Elegant, flavour-forward plated desserts with a modern, creative edge. • A progressive pastry counter offering inventive takes on nostalgic favourites. • Signature handcrafted coffees—perfect for pairing with your sweet fix at any hour. And because sweet

Section: Hotel Sales Script
highlights to savour: • Elegant, flavour-forward plated desserts with a modern, creative edge. • A progressive pastry counter offering inventive takes on nostalgic favourites. • Signature handcrafted coffees—perfect for pairing with your sweet fix at any hour. And because sweet cravings don’t follow a clock, the 24/7 menu keeps things flowing-with pastries, quick bites, and coffee available for dine-in or takeaway. The Cafe is where creativity, nostalgia, and everyday indulgence come together-with moments that taste as good as they look. GENIUS SPACES – Small, Smart, Purposeful Just alongside, we have our Genius Spaces. These are smaller, but equally impressive rooms-perfect for brainstorming sessions, creative workshops, or intimate meetings that need a touch of polish. Each space comes equipped with state-of-the-art technology and seamless professional support-because great ideas deserve a great setting. ROOM - Where Calm Meets Character Let’s step into our rooms, designed not just for a stay, but to elevate your mood. Across our 291 rooms, you’ll find a soothing blend of light pastels, soft blues and greens, and warm wood textures-spaces that instantly calm you after a journey. Every detail here has been thoughtfully curated to create an experience that feels both welcoming and refreshing. You’ll notice: • Mumbai’s spirit reflected in the curated art-hot air balloons, intricate cityscapes, and local motifs, weaving quiet stories on the walls.

Section: Hotel Sales Script
Every detail here has been thoughtfully curated to create an experience that feels both welcoming and refreshing. You’ll notice: • Mumbai’s spirit reflected in the curated art-hot air balloons, intricate cityscapes, and local motifs, weaving quiet stories on the walls. • A Blue Tokai <Not sure if we need to consider mentioning the brand names>espresso machine in every room, unlike other hotels with ICONIQA’s unique blends-because airport coffee just doesn’t cut it. <else> An espresso machine in every room, serving ICONIQA’s unique coffee blends-because airport coffee just doesn’t cut it. • Hypoallergenic linen for a truly cloud-like sleep experience. • An indulgent, non-alcoholic minibar, included as part of your stay—because meaningful touches should simply be a given. And this-this is something you won’t find anywhere else: ICONIQA Hotel Mumbai is the world’s first hotel to feature an in-room Smart Laundry Closet. Refresh your garments at your convenience-no waiting, no calls, just seamless comfort built into your space. These rooms aren’t just where you stay. They’re where your mood resets, and your journey finds its pause. THE BOMBAY SWIM CLUB + SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity

Section: Hotel Sales Script
SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity jacuzzi, a spa, and a fully equipped gym. And soon, it will also be home to an exciting Japanese-Mexican kitchen-where sushi meets tacos, served with uninterrupted skyline views. Bombay Swim Club is open to everyone with a minimum spend of Rs. 2500 per head. Up here, it’s not just about being above the city. It’s about feeling a little beyond it. Hidden from public view, and open to those who know is Scarletta-our invitation-only speakeasy Unapologetically bold, Scarletta is the space for exclusive gatherings, after-parties, or simply soaking in private time with friends. Closing lines At ICONIQA, it’s not about ticking boxes — it’s about tuning into how you feel. Whether it’s a quick pitstop, a rooftop escape, or a sweet moment at midnight — you’ll always find a space that fits your vibe. Hope you enjoyed the walk — and even more, we hope you come back to live it for real. ****

Section: Hotel Sales Script
Starting in the Lobby – First Impressions Welcome to ICONIQA Hotel – Mumbai International Airport. We are trying to reimagine the traditional airport hotel, and on this walk I will show you how. We’re just 300 meters from Terminal 2, but the moment you step inside, it feels more like a lifestyle destination than a boring hotel stop. That’s the whole idea: just because you're between flights-or meetings-doesn’t mean your experience should feel "in between." Unlike the norm, when you enter the hotel, you enter a vibrant bar - the Aviator Lounge. At Aviator, we focus on a global small plates menu – non-messy, all day, and really cool. This has been designed as a space for you to have a meeting or enjoy a cocktail, as it seamlessly blends business and pleasure. Its not your usual lobby lounge, but the heart of the ground floor. Morning coffee, post-meeting cocktails, late-night wind-downs-it's whatever you want it to be. The idea is to make the lobby a place you actually want to hang out in. From a sensory perspective – we have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from

Section: Hotel Sales Script
have kinetic sculptures, incredible AI generated digital art, a beautiful Japanese hand crushed paper sculpture as if it’s fabric billowing in the wind, music to match the mood and a just every small through to ensure this space goes from work to play seamlessly It’s more than just the heart of the lobby-it’s your anytime-anywhere hangout zone. Key Talking Points: Entrance – Enter a bar and not the lobby. Bar is multi-purpose. Cocktails. Global menu. Multi-sensory experience – interactive art, ICONIQA playlist on Spotify. So where do we check in… That’s to the right. Lets talk about design a little bit. Baccarat inspired chandeliers dot the entrance foyer, and then you go towards the reception that is crowned with an incredible black crystal chandelier. The counter is made with little Bisazza tiles – and the pattern is from an antique Kashmiri rug. But instead of putting the Kashmiri rug in the lobby, we decided to get one made to mimic the pixelation of the Bisazza tiles. Lights are by Roche Bobois and Baccarat. If you want, you can go the entire stay glued to your screen on whatsapp. Key Talking Points Design is at the heart of everything we do. The Kashmiri rug became the Bisazza tile counter. The Bisazza tile counter became the handmade rug. Whatsapp powers the entire guest experience So what can you do on Whatsapp with the hotel? (You will explain whatsapp as you walk from the lobby to the Iconiqa Room) Pretty much everything. From Checkin in, ordering a car, linen, or booking a massage – its all available seamless. No app downloads, no waiting. Just seamless, instant hospitality. We decided to do away with the idea of the coffee shop. Welcome to Kadak Lab: our indoor-outdoor modern bazaar inspired Pan-Indian restaurant that is multi-sensory and multi-functional Again,we’ve done things differently. The first bit is the Sweet Lab that’s open 24x7. Think of this as a cute café with incredible desserts and Indian inspired snacks all day. This isn’t your typical Indian dining space. Kadak brings together the heart of regional Indian cuisine, elevated with global inspiration. Here, you'll experience bold flavours crafted from premium ingredients sourced from around the world—where every dish feels familiar yet new. feels familiar yet new. A few highlights to notice: • Kadak Restaurant, a vibrant, open live kitchen brings the energy of the restaurant to life. • Kadak Garden - Step outdoors and you’ll find two live counters—a South Indian street food spot, Cocktail Bar and Snack Bar. • Kadak Parlour - with floor to ceiling window, the space can be used for breakfast, meetings, or even hired privately for parties and events. The Garden bar vibe is niche, casual, and experiential—with a signature bar offering house-crafted cocktails crafted exclusively for the space. • The immersive ambience, complemented by atmospheric lighting and curated soundscapes, sets the tone for every meal. • And every dish arrives on handcrafted crockery—with custom presentation that’s as considered as the flavours themselves. Kadak Lab serves a buffet breakfast exclusively for in-house guests, while lunch and dinner are à la carte, crafted to offer a more personalized, plate-by-plate experience. It’s comfort food—but designed to surprise you. Kadak Cafe – Sweet, Progressive, Open 24/7 Kadak Cafe—a lively, all-day, all-night space where bold flavours meet artistic presentation. A few highlights to savour: • Elegant, flavour-forward plated desserts with a modern, creative edge. • A progressive pastry counter offering inventive takes on nostalgic favourites. • Signature handcrafted coffees—perfect for pairing with your sweet fix at any hour. highlights to savour: • Elegant, flavour-forward plated desserts with a modern, creative edge. • A progressive pastry counter offering inventive takes on nostalgic favourites. • Signature handcrafted coffees—perfect for pairing with your sweet fix at any hour. And because sweet cravings don’t follow a clock, the 24/7 menu keeps things flowing-with pastries, quick bites, and coffee available for dine-in or takeaway. The Cafe is where creativity, nostalgia, and everyday indulgence come together-with moments that taste as good as they look. GENIUS SPACES – Small, Smart, Purposeful Just alongside, we have our Genius Spaces. ROOM - Where Calm Meets Character Let’s step into our rooms, designed not just for a stay, but to elevate your mood. Section: Hotel Sales Script
SCARLETTA - The Rooftop Escape "Now let’s head upstairs-where the energy shifts and the city skyline become part of your experience. Welcome to The Bombay Swim Club-Mumbai’s first true day club. It’s a rooftop playground with splash pools, an infinity jacuzzi, a spa, and a fully equipped gym. And soon, it will also be home to an exciting Japanese-Mexican kitchen-where sushi meets tacos, served with uninterrupted skyline views. Bombay Swim Club is open to everyone with a minimum spend of Rs. 2500 per head. Up here, it’s not just about being above the city. It’s about feeling a little beyond it. Hidden from public view, and open to those who know is Scarletta-our invitation-only speakeasy Unapologetically bold, Scarletta is the space for exclusive gatherings, after-parties, or simply soaking in private time with friends. Closing lines At ICONIQA, it’s not about ticking boxes — it’s about tuning into how you feel. Whether it’s a quick pitstop, a rooftop escape, or a sweet moment at midnight — you’ll always find a space that fits your vibe. Hope you enjoyed the walk — and even more, we hope you come back to live it for real. ****

Traditional spa therapies are replaced ICONIQA style with candlelight therapies. Functional massages to help with jetlag or hangovers, along with foot massages by the poolside at Bombay Swim Club.
